title: Git Workflow
description: Inspect status and diffs before commit or PR work. Preserve user changes, avoid destructive git operations, and require explicit evidence fo
body: Inspect status and diffs before commit or PR work. Preserve user changes, avoid destructive git operations, and require explicit evidence for branch/remote actions. Workflow: read binding roadmap and source, inspect relevant implementation, identify owner package, verify generated artifacts and acceptance coverage, then report exact evidence. Non-goals: placeholders, shallow descriptions, or docs that are not backed by code.
